title: Security Scan
findings: Security scan found one concrete medium issue: mounted store aliases are only non-empty strings but are used directly as by-alias filesystem path segments, allowing path traversal outside the intended symlink directory.

issues_found.title: Store alias path traversal escapes by-alias symlink directory
issues_found.description: Mounted store aliases are validated only as non-empty strings, but syncStoreAliasLinks and detectAliasLinkDrift use alias directly in join(byAliasDir, alias). An alias containing '../' or path separators can make doctor/store operations create, remove, or inspect symlinks outside ~/.fabric/stores/by-alias, causing unsafe filesystem mutation in the user's Fabric home.
issues_found.fix_direction: Constrain MountedStore.alias and storeIdentity.canonical_alias to a safe single path segment such as /^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$/ and reject '.', '..', slash and backslash; also defensively resolve link paths and verify they remain inside byAliasDir before rmSync/symlinkSync/lstatSync.
